welcome.title: Laboratory Initiation
welcome.description: Welcome to Inventorium - your AI-enhanced experimental apparatus for task orchestration and project manifestation.
welcome.subtitle: Let us calibrate your laboratory instruments and familiarize you with the mystical sciences.

projects-overview.title: Research Venues
projects-overview.description: Organize your experimental protocols into research venues for superior oversight and mystical visualization.

benefits.organize: Cluster related experiments in arcane harmony
benefits.visualize: Observe progress through the aetheric lens
benefits.track: Monitor experimental milestones and temporal markers
benefits.collaborate: Share knowledge with fellow mad scientists

projects-overview.hint: ⚡ Laboratory Wisdom: Every experiment can be assigned to a research venue

create-project.title: Manifest Your First Research Venue
create-project.description: Let us establish a research venue to organize your experimental endeavors. Venues provide the mystical framework for clustering related protocols.
create-project.step1: Deploy the creation apparatus (+) rune in the lower portal of your console
create-project.step2: Select the 'Research Venue' chamber within the manifestation dialog
create-project.step3: Inscribe a unique venue designation (lowercase rune-separators, e.g., 'my-first-venue')
create-project.step4: Add a mystical display name and experimental charter description
create-project.hint: Arcane Note: Venue designations must be unique and utilize lowercase with rune-separators

add-todo.title: Add Experiment to Your Venue
add-todo.description: Now let us inscribe an experimental protocol into your research venue. Protocols are the mystical tasks and action invocations you must complete.
add-todo.step1: Deploy the creation apparatus (+) rune once more
add-todo.step2: Select the 'Experiment' chamber within the manifestation dialog
add-todo.step4: Select your research venue from the aetheric dropdown
add-todo.hint: Arcane Note: Protocols can be manifested from any console location using the (+) apparatus
